name: superui
description: Use when users explicitly mention SuperUI, superui, $superui, this skill, 本技能, or need frontend UI workflow skills: design analysis, DESIGN.md, planning, TDD implementation, responsive QA, accessibility, and review.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend UI design, planning, implementation, and review
interface.longDescription: Use SuperUI whenever users explicitly ask for SuperUI/$superui/this skill, or to guide frontend UI work through source analysis, DESIGN.md generation, implementation planning, TDD, responsive and accessibility checks, and review gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $superui to design and implement a frontend UI.
Use SuperUI to analyze this project and generate a DESIGN.md.
